name: ESLint + Prettier
description: Set up ESLint with TypeScript rules and Prettier for formatting. Configured to run as a pre-commit hook via lint-staged, so formatting errors never reach the repo.

steps.description: Check existing linting setup and TypeScript config
Install ESLint, TypeScript plugin, and Prettier
Create ESLint config: TypeScript parser, recommended rules, no-unused-vars, no-floating-promises, prettier last
Create Prettier config: singleQuote, trailingComma all, printWidth 100, tabWidth 2
Add dist, coverage, node_modules, *.json to prettierignore
Add lint, lint:fix, and format scripts
Run linter on codebase and fix auto-fixable issues

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Consistent code style enforced at commit time — no more style debates in PRs
